Question: For the experiment in Example 4.4, show that $$m = 20$$ is also a missing order.
Answer: From $$d \text{sin} \theta = m \lambda$$ , the interference maximum occurs at $$2.87 \text{°}$$ for $$m = 20 .$$ From Equation 4.1, this is also the angle for the second diffraction minimum. ( Note: Both equations use the index m but they refer to separate phenomena.)
